prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-HUNTKNF-AMWOLFHOW-AOVAR Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 13.5" Collector's Hunting Knife Scabbard and Handle - USA Howling Wolf Description: This 13.5" hunting knife will make an impressive addition to your collection. The handle and scabbard feature an etched animal design, with a detailed head design at the base of the grip and intricate etching on the 8" stainless steel blade.

Shopping for someone else? This knife is a perfect gift for the avid hunter and outdoorsman. Search Terms: fixed blade hunting knives hunting knives with sheath patriotic gifts for men hunting knives for men knives for men tactical tactical knives fixed blade knives fixed blade knives with sheath knives for men dagger dagger knife pretty dagger Features: - BOWIE-STYLE FIXED BLADE HUNTING KNIFE: Large decorative sheathed knife with cross-guard featuring a clip point; excellent presentation gift for knife collectors and hunting enthusiasts - ORNAMENTAL POMMEL AND SHEATH: From tip to pommel a matching wild animal outdoor graphic adorns this stainless steel knife in full color that will surly impress one and all. Each fixed blade animal head knife has a 5.5" handle with a solid ornamental animal head pommel full color graphic scabbard and handle - Inspired by outdoor wildlife and the spirit of America - DISPLAY SIZE: Sheathed length: 14 inches; Knife length: 13.5 inches; Blade length: 8 inches; Ideal size for mantle display or behind glass in a showcase - MAKES A GREAT GIFT: Whether for a special occasion or just to show you care these collectible and functional knives are a wonderful present idea === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.5" Howling Wolf Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fixed Blade With Sheath, 8" Stainless Steel Blade, Ornamental Wolf Design, Collector Grade, Display Ready

openai.title_differentiation: Bowie-Style Fixed Blade, Etched Wolf Handle And Sheath, 8" Stainless Steel Blade, 14" Display Size, Gift For Collectors
